since_last: 31% of 86 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.11%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 31% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.36% · BTC -4.88% · Gold -3.19% · Nasdaq100 -1.23%. 31% of 86 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.11%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.11%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -3.38%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMR is the standout at -7.73%
cards.body: Leaders: ZBRA +4.19%, UPST +3.78%, WDAY +3.64%, PUBM +3.30%, INTU +3.21%. Laggards: SMR -7.73%, OKLO -6.64%, OKLO -6.64%, INOD -6.38%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.28% at $156.55
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.28% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
